0:{"rsc":["$","$1","c",{"children":[[["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h1","children":"Installation"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"Mnemosyne v3.6.0 is a standalone Python package — no agent framework required. This page walks through every step from prerequisites to verification."}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Prerequisites"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"Before installing Mnemosyne, make sure you have:"}],"\n",["$","ul",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Python 3.10 or higher"}]," — check with ",["$","code",null,{"children":"python --version"}]]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"pip"}]," or ",["$","strong",null,{"children":"uv"}]," package manager available in your shell"]}],"\n"]}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Quick Install"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"Two commands. That's all it takes."}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Step 1 — Install the package:"}]}],"\n",["$","pre",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"className":"language-bash","children":"# Recommended: pipx (isolated, survives env rebuilds)\npipx install mnemosyne-memory[all]\n\n# Or traditional pip\npip install mnemosyne-memory[all]\n\n# Using uv (faster, but pipx with uv backend preferred for stability)\nuv pip install mnemosyne-memory[all]\n"}]}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Step 2 — Verify:"}]}],"\n",["$","pre",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"className":"language-bash","children":"python -c \"import mnemosyne; print(mnemosyne.__version__)\"\n# Should print: 3.4.0\n"}]}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Upgrade:"}]}],"\n",["$","pre",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"className":"language-bash","children":"pip install --upgrade mnemosyne-memory[all]\n# or: pipx upgrade mnemosyne-memory\n"}]}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"That's it. No database setup, no container orchestration, no config files. Mnemosyne creates its SQLite database automatically on first use."}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Install Options"}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h3","children":"pip vs uv"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":["Both work. ",["$","code",null,{"children":"uv"}]," is faster, but use the matching command:"]}],"\n",["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":"Tool"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Install command"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"pip"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"pip install mnemosyne-memory[all]"}]}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"uv"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"uv pip install mnemosyne-memory[all]"}]}]]}]]}]]}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h3","children":"Extras"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"Mnemosyne ships optional dependency groups you can install as needed:"}],"\n",["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":"Extra"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Command"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"What it adds"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"Core (bare install)"}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"pip install mnemosyne-memory"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Base package with FTS5 keyword search only. Best for low-resource systems (Raspberry Pi, 1 GB VPS) or when using a remote embedding API. ~50 MB RAM."}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Embeddings"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"pip install mnemosyne-memory[embeddings]"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"+ fastembed for semantic vector search"}],". Adds ~800 MB RAM. Best for single-user desktop agents."]}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"LLM consolidation"}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"pip install mnemosyne-memory[llm]"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"+ ctransformers for local LLM sleep consolidation."}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"Everything"}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"pip install mnemosyne-memory[all]"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"All optional dependencies. ~1.5 GB RAM. Full local embeddings + local LLM. Recommended for systems with 8 GB+ RAM."}]]}]]}]]}],"\n","$L3","\n","$L4","\n","$L5","\n","$L6","\n","$L7","\n","$L8","\n","$L9","\n","$La","\n","$Lb","\n","$Lc","\n","$Ld","\n","$Le","\n","$Lf","\n","$L10","\n","$L11","\n","$L12","\n","$L13","\n","$L14","\n","$L15","\n","$L16","\n","$L17","\n","$L18","\n","$L19","\n","$L1a","\n","$L1b","\n","$L1c","\n","$L1d","\n","$L1e"],["$L1f"],"$L20"]}],"isPartial":false,"staleTime":300,"varyParams":null,"buildId":"SYdR-kKTHjaVYHTV66vjl"}
3:["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Optional: sqlite-vec for Performance"}]
4:["$","p",null,{"children":[["$","code",null,{"children":"sqlite-vec"}]," is an **included by default. It moves vector similarity search into native C code inside SQLite. Without it, Mnemosyne uses an in-memory numpy fallback that works fine for most use cases."]}]
5:["$","pre",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"className":"language-bash","children":"pip install sqlite-vec\n"}]}]
6:["$","ul",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":["With ",["$","code",null,{"children":"[all]"}]," only:"]}]," Full semantic search + hybrid retrieval via in-memory numpy cosine similarity. Works great for most deployments."]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":["With ",["$","code",null,{"children":"[all]"}]," + ",["$","code",null,{"children":"sqlite-vec"}],":"]}]," Same semantic search, but vector queries run in native C inside SQLite. Faster on very large datasets."]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":["Without ",["$","code",null,{"children":"[all]"}],":"]}]," FTS5 keyword search only, regardless of sqlite-vec."]}],"\n"]}]
7:["$","p",null,{"children":"Install sqlite-vec only if you need maximum performance on huge datasets."}]
8:["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Verify Installation"}]
9:["$","p",null,{"children":"Check the installed version directly:"}]
a:["$","pre",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"className":"language-bash","children":"python -c \"import mnemosyne; print(mnemosyne.__version__)\"\n"}]}]
b:["$","p",null,{"children":"You can also run a quick smoke test:"}]
c:["$","pre",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"className":"language-python","children":"from mnemosyne import Mnemosyne\n\nmem = Mnemosyne()\nmem.remember(\"Installation test\", importance=0.1)\nresults = mem.recall(\"test\")\nprint(f\"Stored and retrieved {len(results)} memory\")\n"}]}]
d:["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"MCP Server Setup"}]
e:["$","p",null,{"children":"Mnemosyne v3 includes a built-in MCP server for Claude Desktop and other MCP clients:"}]
f:["$","pre",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"className":"language-bash","children":"# Add to your Claude Desktop config (claude_desktop_config.json):\n{\n  \"mcpServers\": {\n    \"mnemosyne\": {\n      \"command\": \"mnemosyne\",\n      \"args\": [\"mcp\"]\n    }\n  }\n}\n"}]}]
10:["$","p",null,{"children":"For SSE transport (web clients):"}]
11:["$","pre",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"className":"language-bash","children":"mnemosyne mcp --transport sse --port 8080\n"}]}]
12:["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Hermes Agent Integration"}]
13:["$","p",null,{"children":"If you're using Mnemosyne as a Hermes plugin:"}]
14:["$","p",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Do NOT install inside Hermes' managed venv."}]," Use pipx:"]}]
15:["$","pre",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"className":"language-bash","children":"pipx install mnemosyne-hermes\nhermes config set memory.provider mnemosyne\nhermes gateway restart\n"}]}]
16:["$","p",null,{"children":"For speed with pipx:"}]
17:["$","pre",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"className":"language-bash","children":"export PIPX_DEFAULT_BACKEND=uv\npipx install mnemosyne-hermes\n"}]}]
18:["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h3","children":"Disable legacy memory"}]
19:["$","p",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":["DO NOT run ",["$","code",null,{"children":"hermes tools disable memory"}]]}]," — source: ",["$","code",null,{"children":"agent/agent_init.py:1163-1172"}],"."]}]
1a:["$","p",null,{"children":["Add to ",["$","code",null,{"children":"~/.hermes/config.yaml"}],":"]}]
1b:["$","pre",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"className":"language-yaml","children":"memory:\n  enabled: false\n  user_profile_enabled: false\n  provider: mnemosyne\n"}]}]
1c:["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h3","children":"Default config"}]
1d:["$","pre",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"className":"language-yaml","children":"# ~/.hermes/config.yaml\nmemory:\n  provider: mnemosyne\n  mnemosyne:\n    auto_sleep: true\n    sleep_threshold: 50\n\n## Development Install (from Source)\n\nIf you're contributing or want to run the latest unreleased changes:\n\n```bash\n# Clone the repo\ngit clone https://github.com/axdsan/mnemosyne.git\ncd mnemosyne\n\n# Create a virtual environment\npython -m venv .venv\nsource .venv/bin/activate\n\n# Install in editable mode with dev dependencies\npip install -e \".[dev]\"\n"}]}]
1e:["$","p",null,{"children":["The ",["$","code",null,{"children":"-e"}]," flag installs in \"editable\" mode — changes to the source code take effect immediately without re-installing. Perfect for development and debugging."]}]
